title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
